                       +-----------+
                +----->|  Node B3  +---+
+-----------+   |      +-----------+   |      +-----------+
|  Node A1  +---+                      +----->|  Node C1  |
+-----------+   |      +-----------+   |      +-----------+
                +----->|  Node B2  +---+
+-----------+   |      +-----------+   |      +-----------+
|  Node A2  +---+                      +----->|  Node C2  |
+-----------+   |      +-----------+   |      +-----------+
                +----->|  Node B1  +---+
+-----------+   |      +-----------+   |      +-----------+
|  Node A3  +---+                      +----->|  Node C3  |
+-----------+                                 +-----------+
